name: Aboleth
summary: A large aberration that dwells in deep underground lakes.
description: Before the coming of the gods, aboleths lurked in primordial oceans and underground lakes. They reached out with their minds and seize control of the burgeoning life-forms of the mortal realm, making those creatures their slaves. Their domination made them combative and cruel.

name: Animated Armor
summary: A suit of magically animated plate armor.
description: This empty suit of armor clanks as it walks, and poses a formidable opponent. Animated armor is often used as a guardian in wizard towers and noble estates.

name: Basilisk
summary: An eight-legged reptile whose gaze can turn creatures to stone.
description: Travelers sometimes find objects that look like extraordinarily lifelike stone carvings of creatures. A basilisk's petrifying gaze is so deadly that the creature itself can become petrified if caught by surprise by its own reflection.

name: Bugbear
summary: A hairy goblinoid born for battle and mayhem.
description: Bugbears are born for battle and mayhem. Surviving by raiding and hunting, they bully the weak and despise being bossed around. Despite their lazy and brutish demeanor, bugbears are surprisingly stealthy.

name: Adult Red Dragon
summary: A huge, fearsome dragon that breathes devastating fire.
description: The most covetous of the true dragons, red dragons tirelessly seek to increase their treasure hoards. They are exceptionally vain, even for dragons, and their conceit is reflected in their proudly maintained lairs.

name: Gelatinous Cube
summary: A nearly transparent ooze that fills dungeon corridors.
description: Gelatinous cubes scour dungeon passages in silent, predictable patterns, absorbing carrion, creatures, and trash. They leave perfectly clean passages in their wake.

name: Goblin
summary: A small, black-hearted humanoid that lair in dungeons and other dismal settings.
description: Goblins are small, black-hearted, selfish humanoids that lair in caves, abandoned mines, despoiled dungeons, and other dismal settings. Individually weak, goblins gather in large numbers to torment other creatures.

name: Kobold
summary: A small reptilian humanoid that serves dragons and hoards treasure.
description: Kobolds are craven reptilian humanoids that worship evil dragons as demigods and serve them as minions and toadies. They inhabit dragons' lairs when they can but more commonly infest dungeons.

name: Lich
summary: An undead spellcaster who has bound its soul to a phylactery.
description: A lich is an undead spellcaster, usually a wizard or sorcerer, that has used dark magic to bind its soul to a phylactery. Liches are gaunt and skeletal, their desiccated flesh barely holding together.

name: Mimic
summary: A shapechanger that can alter its form to resemble an object.
description: Mimics can alter their outward texture to resemble wood, stone, and other basic materials. A mimic in its amorphous form resembles a large chest — its most common disguise.

name: Owlbear
summary: A large monstrosity with the body of a bear and head of an owl.
description: An owlbear's screech echoes through dark valleys and benighted forests, going before the great beast like a bytes. Owlbears are ferocious and attack any creature that blunders into their territory.

name: Skeleton
summary: An animated pile of bones wielding weapons.
description: Skeletons arise when animated by dark magic. They obey the orders of their creator, acting as guards and soldiers. They fight until destroyed, for as combatants they lack the ability to retreat.

name: Troll
summary: A large giant that regenerates damage unless burned by fire or acid.
description: Born with voracious appetites, trolls eat anything they can catch and devour. They possess an incredible capacity for regeneration, which allows them to recover from almost any wound.

name: Zombie
summary: A shambling undead corpse animated by dark magic.
description: From somewhere in the darkness, a mournful groaning heralds the shambling approach of the zombie. This wretched creature has been animated by dark magic, its soul trapped in a rotting body.
